social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text:
I just spoke with the CEO of the East of England Ambulance Service Trust following yesterday's train crash.

social.name: Emmanuel Macron
social.text: Ensemble pour les 10 ans de VivaTech. Foncez, osez et ne lâchez rien !

social.name: Emmanuel Macron
social.text:
Vous avez changé le visage de la France et fait de VivaTech un rendez-vous mondial de l’innovation. Vous pouvez être fiers ! 🇫🇷

social.text:
Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu:
"I send heartfelt condolences to the families of the Commander of the Armored Corps 52nd Battalion, Lt. Col. Dor Gedalia Ben Simhon, and of three heroic fighters whose names have not yet been cleared for publication, may God avenge their blood.
